titleStmt.title: SII 11.12: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 12. (B.K. No. 71 of 1926-27). SORAṬŪR, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB At the topchakra, probably the Sudarśana, and a svastikā.SET UP NEAR THE AŚVATTHAKAṬṬE NEAR THE VEṄKAṬĒŚA TEMPLE.

summary.p: The record refers itself to the reign of Amōghavarsha I and is dated in Śaka 788, Sarvajit (= A.D. 867-868). It registers a remission of taxes on ghee in favour of the Fifty (gāvuṇḍas) of Saraṭapura made by Mahāsāmanta Āhavāditya Kuppeyarasa of the Yādava-vaṁśa (see No. 11 above) and a gift of ghee made by the (Community of) Five Hundred. At the time of the grant, Kuppeyarasa was governing the Purigeṟenāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svastyamōghavarṣa pṛthuvīballava mahā
rājādhirāja paramēśvara bhaṭṭārakarpṛthuvīrājyā
bhivṛddhi yuttarōttaraṁ saluttire śakanṛpakālātī
ta ṣaṣṭhi nāma saṁvatsaraṅga ḷuttama madya
majaghanyaphalada vṛttigaḷāguttiḻdu
saṁghaṭitāptāvartaṁgaḷu punaḥ punarāvartta
ryyadaṁ negaṁbhūtabhaviṣya varttamānavāgī kramagaḷi ndeḻnūṟiṇbhatteṇṭaneya
sarvvajitemba saṁvatsaraṁ pravarttisa paḍeḍhakkāphāḷi māhādhvajanitya śrīya
mōghavarṣadēvasya tasya mahāsāmantaḥ svasti pracaṇḍamaṇḍa
ḷāgra khaṇḍitārātimaṇḍaḷa pratāpasaṁpanna yādavavaṁśōdbhava raṇa The expression might beraṇamūrkhkhaṁ. See below, No. 22, 1. 6.
dhavaḷa ṣaṭguṇāḷaṁkāra Āhavādhitya śrīmatkuppeya
rasa rpu�rigeṟenāḍa nāḷuttire saraṭapurada Ayvadimbarggā
yānupurbbadinda tuppadeṟenuḻidōn © Oleya ca
ndiganuṁ gāḷiganuṁ modalāge Aynūrbbaruṁ tuppava
nuḻidōr © bahubhirvvasudhā bhuktvā rājabhiḥ sagarādibhiḥ
yasyayasya yadā bhūmiḥ tasyatasya tadā phalaṁ © sadatāṁ paradattaṁ vvā yō
harīti vasu(ṁ)ntharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvariṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭiyaṁ jāyatē krimiḥ ©
© svasti śrī candrādityana śilpi gōpamman
© svastiśrī Ayvadimbaruṁ gāvuṇḍugaḷuṁ prajeyuṁ Iḻdu mā
ḍida stiti Eḷadōṭṭoda ke paḍida baḻike Eraḍu koyiluThe letter da is engraved above the line.
pariyāraṁ goṭōr Ida naḻiye baḻdōṁ pañcamāhāpā
taka keyge pannaraḍuṁ varisa pariyāra yirmmattargge Ondu darmma
© svastiśrī beḷuvala Lines 23 and 24
nā giyamma niḻi
Digital edition of SII 11.12 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
